final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a TikTok-style product detail page image for an overseas e-commerce listing.

Style/medium: clean e-commerce product detail page, flat-lay and lifestyle hybrid, crisp and elegant presentation

Composition:
  hero product shot centered with supporting items arranged around it
  foldable prayer mat unfolded to show the classic pattern, green tassel prayer beads placed alongside, silk storage pouch open nearby
  key feature callouts with short English text labels pointing to product details
  generous white or soft neutral background to keep focus on the product

Subject:
  premium foldable prayer mat with classic woven pattern — soft, portable, travel-friendly
  matching green tassel prayer beads (misbaha/tasbih)
  elegant silk storage pouch that holds all items
  complete gift set presented together

Scene/backdrop: clean neutral background, minimal styling, no clutter

Lighting/mood: bright, even, inviting — conveys premium quality and gift-worthy appeal

Color palette: rich emerald / deep green as the dominant accent color throughout the set

Materials/textures: soft fabric texture on the prayer mat, silk sheen on the pouch, smooth beads

Text (verbatim):
  "Premium Foldable Prayer Mat Set"
  "Classic Pattern · Ultra Soft · Portable"
  "Matching Green Tasbih Beads"
  "Elegant Silk Storage Pouch"
  "Perfect Ramadan & Eid Gift 🌙"
  "Shop Now"

Constraints:
  all text must be in accurate English
  product features must be clearly highlighted to drive purchase intent
  layout should feel suitable for TikTok / social commerce product detail page
  reference the three provided product photos for color, pattern, and item details

Avoid: dark or moody lighting, cluttered backgrounds, inaccurate colors, non-English text
